steps.title: Identify what the variables represent
steps.content: In the function $f(x) = 4,000(1.02)^x$, the variable $x$ represents years after the initial investment, and $f(x)$ represents the value of the CD in dollars.

steps.title: Interpret f(2) ≈ 4,186.12 in context
steps.content: The statement $f(2) \approx 4,186.12$ means we substitute $x = 2$ into the function. Since $x$ is measured in years and $f(x)$ gives the dollar value, this means 2 years after the investment was made, the value of the CD was approximately 4,186.12 dollars. That matches choice C — C is correct.
